# Audit Evidence Template

Use this for governance, compliance, release, or parity evidence packets.

```markdown
# Audit Evidence Packet: <scope>

## Scope and standard

<What is being audited and what rule, requirement, or claim applies.>

## Evidence summary

| Evidence ID | Source | Type | Fact proven | Confidence | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|

## Control or requirement mapping

| Control/requirement | Evidence IDs | Status | Gaps | Action |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## Exceptions and risks

| ID | Exception/risk | Severity | Owner | Resolution path |
|---|---|---|---|---|

## Signoff readiness

<Ready, ready with exceptions, or not ready.>
```
